scope: GSC-only analysis derived from the BCC keyword master list + Search Console snapshots. Refreshed off the live 2026-06-15 fetch (runner restarted today; latest snapshot 2026-06-15). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated. Page counts come only from keywords-master.json: 74 keyword entries map to 49 distinct target pages (42 live www URLs, 7 staging-targeted).
wins: Four core commercial terms hold top-3: 'bariatric surgery counseling' (#1.6, +2.0, 8 impressions - now #1-2 nationally), 'bariatric counseling san antonio' (#1.7), 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' (#1.8) and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' (#2.7).
'san antonio bariatric center' recovered hard: 27.1 -> 11.0 (delta +16.1, 5 impressions) - last week's apparent slip reversed, confirming it was day-to-day swing, not a real loss.

'bariatric therapist' broke into the top 10 at #6.4 (11.0 -> 6.4, +4.6, 5 impressions) and 'nutritional counseling san antonio tx' rose 27.4 -> 23.0 (+4.4) on 13 impressions - the strongest mover backed by real volume.

Aggregate visibility improved week-over-week: impression-weighted avg position tightened from 18.84 (2026-06-11) to 16.54 (2026-06-15), and 'holistic approach to weight loss' (+13.4) and 'weight loss counseling' (+5.6) both climbed.

Blog content still carries the impression load at page-1 positions: the hydration post pulls 2,837 impressions at #6.4 (13 clicks - the site's main click driver) and the Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound medications post 1,117 impressions at #9.3.
needs_attention: Biggest real concern: the national head term 'bariatric counseling' dropped off page 1, 6.5 -> 16.9 (delta -10.5) on 26 impressions - the highest-impression tracked term and the most material slip this cycle.

Other slips with real impressions: 'weight loss counseling or therapy' 2.3 -> 10.2 (-7.9, 5 impr), 'weight loss therapy' 7.0 -> 13.7 (-6.7, 7 impr) and 'weight loss programs san antonio tx' 48.3 -> 55.3 (-7.0).

Coverage: 25 of 74 tracked KEYWORDS show impressions; 49 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, not a page count - and most staging-targeted tracker URLs (7 of 49 distinct target pages) are most likely stale pointers to pages already live on www (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic), per the 2026-06-03 sitemap check.

Near-zero CTR persists: 5 clicks on 1,598 impressions in the latest snapshot (~0.3%) - strong visibility is still not converting to clicks - and total daily impressions remain ~35% below the early-May 2,447 peak.

Caveat: many tracked terms register only a handful of impressions, so single-cycle deltas are directional, not precise - e.g. last week's 'nutrition counseling' -57 and 'san antonio bariatric center' -13.7 both reversed this week.
priority_actions: Investigate and defend 'bariatric counseling' (national head term, 26 impr, 6.5 -> 16.9) - check for a title/content/internal-link change or cannibalization, since this is the single most material drop and the highest-volume tracked term.

Keyword-tracker hygiene: repoint the 7 staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match them - likely recovers a chunk of the 49 'no-impression' keywords with no new publishing.
Fix CTR by linking from the high-impression blog posts (hydration 2,837 impr; medications 1,117 impr) into the matching service pages with clear consultation CTAs.
Press the wins while they're warm: tighten on-page for 'bariatric therapist' (#6.4) and 'nutritional counseling san antonio tx' (#23, 13 impr) to push them up a tier.
Add FAQ schema to core service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
If a staging->prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes - do not infer a count from the keyword/GSC data.
summary: After restarting the runner and refetching, the 6/15 picture is better than last week's stale read: impression-weighted position improved to 16.54, four core commercial terms hold top-3, and 'san antonio bariatric center' (+16.1) and 'bariatric therapist' (#6.4) rebounded. The one real worry is the national head term 'bariatric counseling' slipping 6.5 -> 16.9 on 26 impressions; CTR stays near zero (5 clicks / 1,598 impr). Competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
